description: Manually defined bear market windows from SPY price history (peaks to troughs). NOT from academic papers — Pagan & Sossounov (2003) provides the dating methodology but their data ends at 1997. These dates are from Yahoo Finance SPY prices.
dateSource: SPY price history via Yahoo Finance. Peak/trough dates identified by visual inspection of price charts and standard financial reporting.

eventWindows.label: Dot-com bear bottom (data starts 2002-07-30, SPY trough Oct 9 2002)
Global Financial Crisis (SPY peak Oct 9 2007, trough Mar 9 2009)
COVID crash (SPY peak Feb 19, trough Mar 23 2020)
2022 bear market (SPY peak 4797 Jan 3, trough 3577 Oct 12, -25.4%)

passCriterion: Detector fires within 5 trading days of SPY crossing -15% drawdown from peak. 90% coverage is a regression gate, not an academic target.
